name: Ham-Basil Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Smoked or cooked ham; diced
1 tablespoon Chopped fresh basil or parsley
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). Bake the pie shell for 5 minutes.
2. Mix ham, cheese, and chopped basil in a bowl.
3. Spread mustard on the bottom of the prebaked pie shell. Sprinkle with the ham-cheese mixture.
4. Beat eggs, whipping cream, and black pepper together.
5. Pour egg mixture over the filling in the pastry shell.
6. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese evenly over the top.
7. Bake, uncovered, at 350°F (175°C) on the middle rack of the oven for 30 to 35 minutes or until the filling is set and lightly browned.
8. Garnish with fresh basil leaves, parsley, and sliced tomatoes.
9. Serve immediately.
